description: School field trip permission and details

events.title: Field Trip - California Science Museum
events.location: California Science Museum, 700 Museum Way, San Francisco, CA 94107
events.description: 4th grade field trip to science museum with guided tour and planetarium show

events.title: Field Trip - Science Museum
events.location: California Science Museum, 700 Museum Way, San Francisco, CA 94107
events.description: A field trip to the California Science Museum. Schedule includes departure at 8:30 AM, arrival at 9:30 AM, guided tour and exhibits from 9:30-11:30 AM, lunch from 11:30 AM-12:15 PM, a planetarium show and free exploration from 12:15-1:30 PM, and departure at 2:00 PM with return to school at 3:00 PM. Cost is $15 per student. Students should bring a bag lunch, water bottle, comfortable walking shoes, and a light jacket. A permission form is attached and must be returned by March 5th.

events.title: Field Trip Payment Deadline
events.description: Payment of $15 per student is due by March 5, 2026, to cover admission, the planetarium show, and bus transportation.

events.title: Field Trip Chaperone Volunteer Sign-up
events.description: Chaperones are needed for the field trip. Parents interested should email Mr. Johnson.
